Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 157 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 29 0 0}Seriously, Junpei? Of all the dumb things you could say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 157 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 30 0 0}Anyway... It's nice that we get the chance to go out like this every once in a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 157 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 31 0 0}Let's just try to stay positive and chin up.[n]{f 1 1}
